items.prompt: A common clock generator pattern uses…
choices: Forever loop with half-period delays between toggles
No clock at all in the host
Only a one-shot eval with no timing
Only asynchronous random delays with no structure
items.explain: Half-period forever loops are the literacy pattern.

choices: Assert for N posedges then release synchronously
Stay asserted forever for every test
Release before the first clock edge always with no plan
Only exist in the wave viewer, not the host

items.prompt: If reset is held forever, the DUT often…
choices: Never reaches normal operation—you are testing stuck reset

items.prompt: After reset deasserts, the host should continue stepping clock and eval—not stop immediately unless the test ends.
items.explain: Release is the start of real exercising, not the end.
